topic: Two coworkers discover they went to the same summer camp
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya nearly dropped her lukewarm coffee when Liam pointed at the faded t-shirt hanging on the drying rack. "Wait a second," she breathed, her eyes widening. "Is that... the 'Camp Whispering Pines' logo?" Liam, usually reserved, was practically vibrating. He snatched the shirt, his fingers tracing the embroidered pine trees with an almost reverent touch. "No way. I thought I was the only one who went." Maya felt a sudden, dizzying lightness bloom in her chest. A wide, unrestrained smile stretched across her face, pulling at the corners of her eyes. "You actually went? Oh my gosh, Liam, that's incredible! We have to talk about this. We went to the same summer camp!"

[story 2]

"You're kidding me," Sarah whispered, clutching her phone as she stared at the shared photo. The picture was grainy, taken at a lakeside bonfire, and there, undeniably, were both of them. Ben leaned closer, his breath catching in his throat. "Look at the badge," he murmured, tapping the screen. "It's the same one. Camp Redwood Creek." A thrill shot through Sarah, making her whole body tingle. She let out a small, high-pitched laugh, a sound that felt entirely too big for the quiet office. "This is unbelievable! I feel like I just won the lottery. We were at the same summer camp?"

[story 3]

"I can't believe this," Alex exclaimed, practically bouncing in his chair. He practically leaped to his feet, gesturing wildly toward the brochure lying on the desk. "This is impossible! The camp newsletter, the cabin number... it matches exactly! I’ve been trying to remember if anyone else mentioned it, but I never thought it would be..." He stopped mid-sentence, his gaze fixed on the document, a bright, almost glowing expression washing over his features. A deep, satisfied hum resonated in his chest. "We were both at Camp Sunshine Meadow? This is the best thing that's happened all year!"
